# BP-66 negative: errors.Is preserves the wrapped sentinel relationship.
lang: go
file: BP-66-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"fmt"
)

var ErrMissing = errors.New("missing")

func lookup() error {
	err := fmt.Errorf("lookup: %w", ErrMissing)
	if errors.Is(err, ErrMissing) {
		return nil
	}
	return fmt.Errorf("lookup failed: %w", err)
}
